name: Lightning Struck
subtitle: Ready to State? The time to Emulate?

apps.name: SwitchUI
apps.localizedDescription: A high-performance Nintendo Switch emulator for ARM64 devices.

permissions.usageDescription: JIT is required for playable frame rates on SwitchUI.

news.title: LiveContainer Support!
news.caption: New Environment Checks
news.text: SwitchUI now detects if you're running in LiveContainer. We've added a safety prompt to ensure you're aware of the environment for the best emulation experience!

news.title: Welcome to SwitchUI!
news.caption: The journey begins.
news.text: Thanks for adding the Lightning Struck source! SwitchUI is officially in development.
